auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to track your business registration.
auth.signupSubtitle: Register in minutes, we'll guide you the rest of the way.

dashboard.noCasesBody: Answer a few questions, get an instant quote, and we'll handle every government office for you.
dashboard.nothingNeeded: Nothing needed from you right now — we'll let you know the moment that changes. 🎉

money.title: Money
money.subtitle: Invoice your customers and track expenses.
money.notAccountingNote: This is a lightweight record-keeping tool, not full accounting software. It won't file your taxes — export the CSV for your accountant when you need a proper set of books.

referrals.title: Refer & earn
referrals.subtitle: Share your code. When a friend registers their business and pays, you both get credit toward your LaunchGH fees.
referrals.empty: No credits yet — share your code to start earning.
